name: Vancouver Canine Dog Walking
description: Professional, fear-free dog walking serving Kitsilano and surrounding neighbourhoods. Known for carefully matched group hikes and detailed walk reports after every outing.

testimonials.author: Vancouver Canine client
testimonials.text: Our two pups always came home so happy and tired. Their walk reports and pictures each walk are such an added bonus.

name: Indiana Bones Dog Adventures
description: Off-leash forest hikes and adventure walks for high-energy dogs in Vancouver. A favourite for owners who want more than a walk around the block.

testimonials.author: Indiana Bones client
testimonials.text: This isn't just a walk around the block — it's a real adventure. If you have a high-energy dog in Vancouver, this is the gold standard.

name: Pawz Unleashed
description: Boutique dog walking and boarding run by Tanya, a trusted name in the West End for over 12 years. Small pack sizes and genuine love for every dog.

testimonials.author: Pawz Unleashed client
testimonials.text: Tanya is hands down the best pet care provider. Our dog has been walking with her for 7+ years and loves every minute.

name: Noelle's Pet Love
description: Dog daycare and walking in Kitsilano with a focus on socialization and behaviour. Particularly well-regarded for working with rescues and reactive dogs.

testimonials.author: Noelle's client
testimonials.text: Noelle and her team helped our rescue improve his reactivity dramatically. He's now confident and happy around other dogs.

name: Sit Stay Sparkle
description: Trusted dog walking and in-home sitting serving Mount Pleasant and nearby neighbourhoods. Detailed post-walk reports, photos, and training reinforcement on every outing.

testimonials.author: Sit Stay Sparkle client
testimonials.text: Sarah sends videos and pics from each walk, plus a full breakdown of how the walk went. Absolutely love this service.

name: North Shore Dog Walkers
description: North Vancouver's most established dog walking service with over 200 five-star reviews. Flexible scheduling, trail walks, and a team that genuinely knows every dog by name.

testimonials.author: North Shore Dog Walkers client
testimonials.text: We've been using North Shore Dog Walkers for 4 years. Our dog loves his walkers and they always accommodate our ever-changing schedule.

name: Fairy Dog Mama
description: Flexible, force-free dog walking and sitting in North Vancouver. Specializes in anxious and reactive dogs, with photo updates and genuine care on every visit.

testimonials.author: Fairy Dog Mama client
testimonials.text: Courtney understands the special requirements for our reactive dog and keeps our training journey on track. A true lifesaver.

name: Woof! Dog Shoppe
description: Beloved Kitsilano grooming salon steps from the dog beach. Known for skilled, caring groomers and a warm atmosphere that keeps dogs calm and coming back.

testimonials.author: Woof! client
testimonials.text: I've been a customer for 8 years. My dogs always look and feel amazing — and they pull towards the shop whenever we walk by.

name: Paw Prints Grooming Salon
description: Established Kitsilano grooming salon with 190+ reviews and a loyal following. Gentle with nervous dogs and known for seasonal photos and personalized care.

testimonials.author: Paw Prints client
testimonials.text: We've been using Paw Prints for years. Our rescue always goes reluctantly but comes out bright and happy — they take such gentle care.

name: Patikoy Pet Grooming & Daycare
description: Spacious, spotlessly clean grooming salon and daycare on West Broadway. Offers daily hikes and a low-stress environment that dogs genuinely love.

testimonials.author: Patikoy client
testimonials.text: Our dog pulls us from home all the way there with excitement. It's been brilliant for socialising her with other dogs.

name: Dashing Dawgs Grooming & Boutique
description: Full-service grooming boutique in the West End with 370+ reviews. A calm, thoughtful environment with groomers who take time to understand each dog's needs.

testimonials.author: Dashing Dawgs client
testimonials.text: Maki handled the drop-off so gently — I've never had a groomer manage separation anxiety so smoothly. I won't go anywhere else.

name: Lucky Tail Grooming & Daycare
description: Highly rated grooming salon and daycare on Main Street with 225+ reviews. Friendly staff, reasonable prices, and a genuine commitment to every dog's comfort.

testimonials.author: Lucky Tail client
testimonials.text: The price is very reasonable and the quality of service is exceptional. I always come back to Lucky Tail — they do such a great job.

name: Raintown Dog Training
description: Vancouver's top-rated positive reinforcement training studio with 194 five-star reviews. Offers puppy classes, group sessions, and private training for all ages and breeds.

testimonials.author: Raintown client
testimonials.text: Before we even put the car in park our pup was losing it — she couldn't wait to get inside to see her friends and favourite trainers.

name: Bow Wow Academy
description: North Vancouver's most-reviewed dog training school with 457 five-star ratings. Yoko and her team use positive reinforcement to build confident, well-mannered dogs.

testimonials.author: Bow Wow Academy client
testimonials.text: Yoko literally helped change my life as a dog owner. In a matter of weeks, walking our reactive rescue became so much more enjoyable.

name: Cascadia Dog Training
description: Highly respected North Vancouver training company known for transforming reactive and anxious dogs. Private sessions, group classes, and a deeply caring team.

testimonials.author: Cascadia client
testimonials.text: We were at a loss and it was our last try before giving our rescue away. Now Hunter can stay alone for 4 hours and his walks are peaceful.
